attacking_style: Launches attacks inside final 1500m, often going too early (multiple instances of premature acceleration). Prefers breakaway stage hunting over bunch sprints, consistently targeting intermediate mountain stages rather than summit finishes.
team_tactics: Israel Premier Tech provides limited cohesive support — riders forced to chase separately rather than working as unit. GEE animates races independently, suggesting aggressive brief rather than protected leader role.
terrain_preference: Intermediate mountain stages and breakaway-friendly parcours suit him best. Exposed on summit finishes (caught by BUITRAGO, unable to close mountain stages alone) and in direct sprint competitions against specialists.
vulnerability: Chronic inability to convert final 200m despite strong positioning — three consecutive runner-up finishes at 2023 Giro. Vulnerable when directly marked by specialists, and makes poor tactical decisions (chasing symbolic KOM points instead of stage win).
key_patterns: Attacks too early inside final 1500m, allowing opponents to conserve for sprint (minimum 2 instances)
Consistent second-place finishes without win conversion — three consecutive podium misses at 2023 Giro
Prioritizes secondary competitions over stage wins, marked PINOT for meaningless KOM points while in winning position
Excels at breakaway selection timing but lacks team support to capitalize on positioning
Strong stage-hunting form across Grand Tour but cannot close summit finishes alone
form_trajectory: neutral: Consistently animated 2023 Giro with multiple top-5s and breakaway placements, but chronic finishing deficiency unchanged despite repeated opportunities
